questions.question: The E-waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011 defines E-waste as?
options: Electronic waste that contains hazardous substances
questions.explanation: Electronic waste that contains hazardous substances

questions.question: Who is responsible for the collection and disposal of E-waste under the E-waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011?
What is the percentage of E-waste that must be recycled or reused according to the E-waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011?
The E-waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011 prohibit the export of E-waste to which country?
The E-waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011 require manufacturers to deposit 10% of the excise duty paid on the sale of electronic products to which fund?
